creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch 2025Q1 references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=6986b9aa527bb753cf70be33b421c894cd9e40bc

commit 6986b9aa527bb753cf70be33b421c894cd9e40bc
Author:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2025-01-28 14:24:41 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2025-01-28 14:30:58 +0000

    www/ladybird: fix build with recent clang

    Recent clang wants <> after the template keyword.  Pull in an upstream
    commit to give clang what it desires.

    Reported by:    yuri
    PR:             276703
    MFH:            2025Q1

    (cherry picked from commit b3650b92314c1ab720ac429362b27017ff928e1e)

 www/ladybird/distinfo | 4 +++-
 2 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)
